devdoc.author: edsphinx
devdoc.details: Designed for compatibility with MultiOracleAggregator and oracle adapters conforming to IPriceOracle.

params.maxDeviationBps: Maximum allowed deviation between oracles (in basis points)

params.inAmount: Amount of base token being priced
params.method: Method used to make the request

constructor.details: Sets the deployer as the owner

params._implementation: Address of the MultiOracleAggregator implementation contract

createAggregator(address,address,address.details: Reverts if an aggregator already exists for the pairSlither reentrancy warning is a false positive: `new` creates a contract at a      deterministic address and executes synchronously, not a reentrancy vector.

params.base: Address of the base token (e.g., ETH)
params.maxDeviationBps: Maximum allowed deviation between oracles (in basis points)
params.oracles: List of IPriceOracle-compatible addresses to register
params.quote: Address of the quote token (e.g., USDC)

returns._0: True if an aggregator exists, false otherwise
Address of the registered aggregator, or zero if none exists

params.inAmount: Amount of base token to quote
params.useMedian: If true, uses median; otherwise, uses average

removeAggregator(address,address).details: Reverts if no aggregator is found

transferAggregatorOwnership(address,addr.details: Reverts if no aggregator is found or if the new owner is zero

transferOwnership(address).details: Reverts if the new owner is zero or same as current

devdoc.title: AggregatorFactory

AggregatorCreated(address,address,addres.notice: Emitted when a new aggregator is deployed

AggregatorCreationSkipped(address,addres.notice: Emitted when an aggregator creation is skipped

AggregatorOwnershipTransferred(address,a.notice: Emitted when the ownership of an aggregator is transferred to a new address

AggregatorRemoved(address,address).notice: Emitted when an aggregator is removed

MaxDeviationUpdated(address,address,uint.notice: Emitted when the max deviation for an aggregator is updated

OwnershipTransferred(address,address).notice: Emitted when the ownership of the contract is transferred to a new address

QuoteRequested(address,address,address,u.notice: Emitted when a quote request is made

aggregatorImplementation().notice: Address of the previously deployed logic contract

createAggregator(address,address,address.notice: Deploys and initializes a MultiOracleAggregator for a given asset pair

existsAggregator(address,address).notice: Returns true if an aggregator exists for a given asset pair         and false otherwise

getAggregator(address,address).notice: Returns the address of the aggregator for a given asset pair

owner().notice: Owner address with permissions to create and remove aggregators

quoteViaFactory(address,address,uint256,.notice: Returns a quote from the registered aggregator using selected method.

removeAggregator(address,address).notice: Removes an existing aggregator for a given pair

transferAggregatorOwnership(address,addr.notice: Transfers the ownership of an aggregator to a new address

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfers the ownership of the contract to a new address

userdoc.notice: Deploys and manages MultiOracleAggregator contracts per asset pair.         Each (base, quote) pair gets its own aggregator instance.
